message:
chore: bump version to 0.4.3 for release

Release 0.4.3 adds graduated confidence for the structural rescue path
based on cargo marker count (.fingerprint, deps, incremental, build),
enabling sbh to confidently clean build-profile subdirectories like
debug/ and release/ under cargo target dirs with custom names. Also
adds .rch-target- (hyphen with leading dot) as a recognized RustTarget
prefix pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "storage_ballast_helper"
-version = "0.4.2"
+version = "0.4.3"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "System service that prevents disk-full scenarios from coding agent swarms via ballast files, artifact scanning, and special location monitoring."
